api: Yousign REST API v3 (https://developers.yousign.com/, product now also branded "Youtrust")
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, researched directly against the live developer portal's machine-readable endpoint index (developers.yousign.com/llms.txt, an index of every reference/ page backed by the portal's own published OpenAPI spec) and individual reference pages for exact methods/paths/bodies. The full documented surface is ~135 distinct operations across signature requests (+ nested signers/approvers/documents/fields/followers/labels/metadata/consent-requests/document-requests), contacts, webhooks, templates, users, workspaces, user invitations, custom properties, custom experiences, electronic seals (+ documents/images), archiving, consumption reporting, workflow sessions/templates/applicants, and 8 identity/document/company/bank-account/watchlist "Verifications" resource families. This pass keeps the 3 legacy-parity streams unchanged (signature_requests, contacts, documents — see docs.md's Known limits for the top-level GET /documents deprecation caveat this parity port inherits) and adds 4 new top-level list streams with a plain GET-list-and-paginate shape (webhooks, templates, users, workflow_sessions) plus 8 write actions covering the signature-request and contact/webhook lifecycle mutations expressible as a single JSON/no-body request. The verification-family resources (bank account, bank account lookup, company, document trust, identity document, identity video, proof of address, watchlist — 8 near-identical list+detail+create shapes, ~24 endpoints), Electronic Seal (+ its own Document/Image sub-resources), Archiving, and Consumption reporting are excluded wholesale below as separate paid add-on product families outside this connector's e-signature-workflow scope, each with one representative per-family exclusion reason rather than duplicating the same reasoning ~24 times.

excluded.reason: single-signature-request detail; identical record shape to the signature_requests list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

generic signature-request field patch with a large optional-field surface (ordering flags, timezone, labels, email customization); Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage, create/activate/cancel cover the primary lifecycle
irreversibly deletes a signature request outright (only permitted outside approval/ongoing status); not modeled this pass, cancel_signature_request covers the in-flight-termination use case
reactivates an expired signature request; a narrower lifecycle action than cancel, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage

signer sub-resource list scoped to one signature request; would require a fan_out over every signature request id, a materially larger scope increase than a plain list stream, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
single-signer detail; same record shape reachable via the parent signature request's embedded signers array
adds a signer to a signature request; a compound nested-resource create tightly coupled to document/field state, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
updates a signer's fields; nested sub-resource mutation, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
irreversibly removes a signer from a signature request
sends a manual reminder notification to one signer; a narrow notification-trigger action, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
sends a one-time-password to a signer for a custom signing flow integration; a narrow OTP-delivery action, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
signs a signature request on behalf of a signer, bypassing Yousign's own signing UI/consent flow; gated to the scale plan and a narrow own-signing-flow use case
pre-verifies a signer's identity document ahead of Advanced Electronic Signature; a narrow identity sub-flow, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
unblocks a signer after an identity-mismatch during Qualified Electronic Signature; a narrow recovery action, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
downloads a PDF identity-verification proof, not a JSON record
downloads the PDF audit trail attached to a signer, not a JSON record
JSON audit-trail sub-resource for one signer; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
lists documents uploaded by one signer via a Signer Document Request; a narrow, deeply-nested sub-resource, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
downloads a document uploaded by a signer, not a JSON record
irreversibly deletes all documents uploaded by a given signer
approver sub-resource list scoped to one signature request; same fan_out-scope concern as the signers list
single-approver detail; same record shape reachable via the parent signature request's embedded data
adds an approver to a signature request; nested sub-resource create, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
updates an approver's fields; nested sub-resource mutation, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
irreversibly removes an approver from a signature request
sends a manual reminder to one approver; narrow notification-trigger action, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage

the CURRENT real per-signature-request document list (replacing the deprecated top-level GET /documents this bundle's legacy-parity documents stream still targets); expressing it correctly needs a fan_out over every signature_request id, a materially larger scope increase deferred past this pass — see docs.md's Known limits
single-document detail; same record shape as the (currently unmigrated) per-signature-request documents list above
uploads a document file (PDF/DOCX/JPEG/PNG multipart, max 50 per signature request) or references an existing Electronic Seal Document; not a plain JSON-body create this dialect's write model targets
updates document metadata (nature, parse_anchors); nested sub-resource mutation, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
irreversibly deletes a document from a signature request
replaces a document's underlying file; a binary-upload operation, not a plain JSON body
downloads the PDF version of one document, not a JSON record
downloads a zip/PDF bundle of every document attached to a signature request, not a JSON record
the legacy top-level document-upload endpoint; the API's own reference explicitly marks this "[DEPRECATED] ... do not use"
field sub-resource list scoped to one document of one signature request; a 3-level-deep nested resource, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage

8 near-identical Verification resource families (bank_accounts, bank_account_lookups, companies, document_analyses, identity_documents, identity_videos, proofs_of_address, watchlists), each with its own list/detail/create endpoint (~24 total) and per-family paid add-on gating (e.g. 'Verify - Bank account verification', 'Document Trust'); a distinct paid-product-family surface (Yousign's identity/company/document Verification suite) outside this connector's e-signature-workflow scope, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
